summary: EThree Agro Solutions v1 build tested end-to-end. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests passed covering auth (all 3 roles + invalid), seeded data (products/machines/expense-categories), full batch lifecycle (create with bill-amount computation + advance-as-payment, Received→Loaded→Drying→Completed status flow, delivery with weight-loss + bill recompute + machine free-up), payments recompute totals, expenses, maintenance, dashboard shape (all 11 fields), reports summary, global search, RBAC (audit + user-create Admin/Manager/Store). Frontend: Login screen renders with logo & demo credentials, autofill+Sign-In authenticates and routes to /dashboard, dashboard shows profit hero + 6 metric cards + Machine Status + Recent Activity, session persists across reload, Customers list works with search, Machines shows 2x2 grid of 4 dryers with status pills, New Entry FAB opens 5-step form with step gating, Batch detail renders QR code + timeline + details + billing + payment history, Batches list has status filter chips, Payments list shows mode badges, Expenses list has FAB, Reports shows profit hero + pending alerts + machine utilization + expense by category, Global Search returns customers, Audit Trail lists entries, More screen links to all sub-screens. No deprecated Expo packages detected. No React Native red screens or console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 854-line file. Consider splitting into routers (auth, customers, batches, payments, expenses, maintenance, dashboard) for maintainability — not urgent.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan context manager in a future refactor.
In batch status endpoint, 'Received' is not currently blocked from re-transition; consider enforcing forward-only status flow at API level.
get_current_user uses HTTPBearer(auto_error=False) which returns None on missing token then raises 401 (works). Confirmed /auth/me returns 401 without token.
seed_data_creation: Test run created 1 customer (TEST Farmer c64dad, C0001), 1 batch (B00001) taken through full lifecycle to Delivered, 2 payments (Cash advance ₹200 + UPI ₹500), 1 expense (Electricity ₹250), 1 maintenance entry, and a couple of TEST users via create-user endpoint. All under Main Branch. Prefix 'TEST' used for cleanup traceability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (https://cardamom-batch-pro.preview.emergentagent.com). Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_ethree_api.py for regression. Login mobile 9999999999/admin123 (Admin). Seed data persisted in DB from this run — subsequent tests will find existing TEST customers/batches; tests are non-destructive and use unique UUID-suffixed data.
